parameters.name: i_paths
parameters.help: Input file list (*.nc)

parameters.name: o_paths
parameters.help: Output file list (*.nc)

parameters.name: overwrite
parameters.help: Allow to overwrite file if already exists.

parameters.name: areas
parameters.help: KML file containing the areas that will be interpolated

parameters.name: cdi_interpolation_algo
parameters.help: CDI filling algorithm

parameters.name: update_step_size
parameters.help: Update step size.

parameters.name: term_thres
parameters.help: If the relative change between the inpainted elevations in the current and a previous step is smaller than this value, the optimization will stop.

parameters.name: term_crit
parameters.help: The termination criteria to use.

parameters.name: term_check_iters
parameters.help: Number of iterations in the optimization after which we will check if the relative tolerance is below the threshold

parameters.name: max_iters
parameters.help: Maximum number of iterations in the optimization

parameters.name: relaxation
parameters.help: Set to >1 to perform over-relaxation at each iteration

parameters.name: print_progress_iters
parameters.help: If '--print_progress True', the optimization progress will be shown after this number of iterations

parameters.name: mgs_levels
parameters.help: Levels of the Multi-grid solver. I.e., number of levels of detail used in the solving pyramid

parameters.name: mgs_min_res
parameters.help: If during the construction of the pyramid of the Multi-Grid Solver one of the dimensions of the grid drops below this size, the pyramid construction will stop at that level

parameters.name: init_with
parameters.help: Initialize the unknown values to inpaint using a simple interpolation function. If using a MGS, this will be used with the lowest level on the pyramid.

parameters.name: convolver
parameters.help: The convolution method to use.

parameters.name: tension
parameters.help: Tension parameter weighting the contribution between a harmonic and a biharmonic interpolation (see the docs and the original reference for more details)

parameters.name: backend
parameters.help: The desired backend where computations should take place.

parameters.name: verbose
parameters.help: Verbosity flag, activate it to have feedback of the current steps of the process in the command line.

parameters.name: show
parameters.help: Show interpolation problem and results on screen.
